overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through a covered urban transit walkway transitioning to a sunlit street beneath massive highway overpasses, concluding with a turn onto an overgrown dirt path. The scene features futuristic brutalist architecture, sparse pedestrian traffic, and light vehicle movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with metal safety railings

events.description: pedestrian with distinctive red hair passes by closely on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking past camera from left to right

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with fluorescent light fixtures running lengthwise
rusted metal railings along the left side overlooking a lower level
large rectangular concrete pillar supporting the overhead structure
linear ceiling lights illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered concrete walkway with artificial lighting. The camera moves forward past metal railings on the left, with concrete pillars periodically appearing. A pedestrian with red hair passes closely by on the left side around the 8-second mark.

events.description: lighting transitions from artificial to natural as the tunnel exit approaches

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright exit at the end of the walkway

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass visible ahead at the exit

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the transition zone where the covered walkway opens toward the exit. Natural light gradually replaces artificial lighting as the end of the tunnel approaches, revealing a massive highway structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open area under massive highway overpass with bright sunlight

events.description: exits the covered walkway into bright sunlight under the highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking out into the sunlit area under the massive overpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the road beside the walkway

entered.detail: tall brutalist concrete pillars supporting the highway overhead
contemporary building with reflective glass facade
clear blue sky visible overhead between structures

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into bright sunlight as the camera exits the tunnel, revealing a massive highway overpass supported by enormous concrete pillars. A modern glass building stands to the right while vehicles begin to appear on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk under elevated highway with mixed traffic

events.description: multiple vehicles pass by on the right side of the walkway
begins turning right toward the dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in same direction
white truck driving past on the road

entered.detail: cars parked along the curb under the overpass
modern street light pole with orange fixture

segments.scene_description: Walking along the sidewalk under the highway overpass, the camera passes parked vehicles and shares the space with moderate pedestrian traffic. Several vehicles drive by on the right, and the camera begins turning right toward the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown dirt path under highway overpass

events.description: turns right off the concrete sidewalk onto a dirt path
ground surface changes from concrete to dirt and vegetation becomes denser

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking up the dirt path into the overgrown area

entered.detail: unpaved dirt trail leading under the overpass into overgrown area
tall grass and bushes alongside the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right off the sidewalk onto an overgrown dirt path. The environment shifts from urban concrete to natural terrain with dense vegetation, while still remaining under the shadow of the massive highway overpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, artificial urban corridor into a bright city street that eventually gives way to an overgrown natural path. It begins inside a covered concrete walkway, moving past metal railings and concrete pillars as a red-haired pedestrian passes by. As the camera approaches the exit, the artificial glow gradually fades, replaced by natural light that reveals a massive highway structure ahead. The scene then opens into bright sunlight upon exiting the tunnel, passing a modern glass building and flowing traffic beneath the shadow of enormous concrete overpasses. Finally, the camera turns right off the urban sidewalk, transitioning from the concrete environment onto a dirt path thick with dense vegetation.
